   229→// ─── Full JSONL log tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   230→// One row per line in full.jsonl, with normalized sub-tables for content blocks,

   233→// Tracks an in-progress session from a shadow branch (entire/<commit>-<hash>).
   234→// Shadow sessions are indexed directly from git without a worktree.
   235→// Once a session is committed to entire/checkpoints/v1 it also appears as a
   236→// CheckpointSessionMetadata; the LogEvent uuid-dedup prevents double-indexing.

   239→  sessionId     String     @unique
   240→  branch        String              // most recently active shadow branch
   241→  seenBlobShas  String     @default("[]")  // JSON array of git blob SHAs already indexed

   243→  cwd           String?
   244→  gitBranch     String?             // the working branch inside the session

   250→  id              Int             @id @default(autoincrement())

   252→  messageId       String?         @unique  // used by file-history-snapshot instead of uuid
   253→  sessionId       String?
   254→  parentUuid      String?
   255→  type            String          // user | assistant | progress | system | file-history-snapshot
   256→  timestamp       DateTime?
   257→  cwd             String?
   258→  gitBranch       String?
   259→  version         String?
   260→  slug            String?
   261→  isSidechain     Boolean?
   262→  userType        String?
   263→  toolUseId       String?
   264→  parentToolUseId String?
   265→  requestId       String?         // present on assistant events
   266→  data            String          // full raw JSON of the event line
   267→  sessionLinkId   Int?
   268→  sessionLink     SessionLink?    @relation(fields: [sessionLinkId], references: [id])
   269→  shadowSessionId Int?
   270→  shadowSession   ShadowSession?  @relation(fields: [shadowSessionId], references: [id])
   271→  contents        LogContent[]
   272→  usage           LogUsage?
   273→  hookProgress    LogHookProgress?
   274→  systemData      LogSystemEvent?
   275→
   276→  @@index([sessionId])
   277→  @@index([type])
   278→  @@index([sessionLinkId])
   279→  @@index([shadowSessionId])
   280→}
   281→
   282→// One row per content block within a user or assistant message.
   283→model LogContent {
   284→  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
   285→  logEventId        Int
   286→  logEvent          LogEvent  @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   287→  role              String    // user | assistant
   288→  contentIndex      Int       // 0-based position in the content array
   289→  contentType       String    // text | thinking | tool_use | tool_result
   290→  text              String?   // type=text
   291→  thinking          String?   // type=thinking
   292→  toolUseId         String?   // type=tool_use (id field) or type=tool_result (tool_use_id field)
   293→  toolName          String?   // type=tool_use
   294→  toolInput         String?   // type=tool_use, JSON text of input object
   295→  toolResultContent String?   // type=tool_result, stringified content
   296→  isError           Boolean?  // type=tool_result
   297→
   298→  @@index([logEventId])
   299→  @@index([toolUseId])
   300→}
   301→
   302→// Token usage summary for assistant messages.
   303→model LogUsage {
   304→  id                       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
   305→  logEventId               Int      @unique
   306→  logEvent                 LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   307→  model                    String?
   308→  stopReason               String?
   309→  inputTokens              Int      @default(0)
   310→  cacheCreationInputTokens Int      @default(0)
   311→  cacheReadInputTokens     Int      @default(0)
   312→  outputTokens             Int      @default(0)
   313→}
   314→
   315→// The `data` sub-object present on progress events (type=hook_progress).
   316→model LogHookProgress {
   317→  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
   318→  logEventId Int      @unique
   319→  logEvent   LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   320→  type       String?  // e.g. hook_progress
   321→  hookEvent  String?  // e.g. PreToolUse, PostToolUse
   322→  hookName   String?  // e.g. PreToolUse:Read
   323→  command    String?  // shell command that was run
   324→}
   325→
   326→// Extra fields for system events.
   327→model LogSystemEvent {
   328→  id                    Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
   329→  logEventId            Int      @unique
   330→  logEvent              LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
   331→  subtype               String?  // e.g. stop_hook_summary, turn_duration
   332→  hookCount             Int?
   333→  stopReason            String?
   334→  preventedContinuation Boolean?
   335→  level                 String?
   336→  durationMs            Int?     // present on turn_duration subtype
   337→}
   338→
   339→// ------------------------------------------- OLD
   340→
   341→model Checkpoint {
   342→  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
   343→  checkpointId String             @unique
   344→  cliVersion   String?
   345→  branch       String?
   346→  strategy     String?
   347→  filesTouched String?            // JSON array: '["file.ts","other.ts"]'
   348→  tokenUsage   String?            // JSON object: '{"input_tokens":0,...}'
   349→  indexedAt    DateTime           @default(now())
   350→  sessions     CheckpointSession[]
   351→}
   352→
   353→model CheckpointSession {
   354→  id                 Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
   355→  checkpointId       String
   356→  sessionIndex       Int                // 0-based position within the checkpoint
   357→  sessionId          String             @unique
   358→  turnId             String?
   359→  agent              String?
   360→  createdAt          DateTime?
   361→  filesTouched       String?            // JSON array
   362→  tokenUsage         String?            // JSON object
   363→  initialAttribution        String?           // JSON object: agent_lines, human_added, agent_percentage, ...
   364→  checkpointTranscriptStart Int?              // line index where this checkpoint's events begin in the transcript
   365→  transcriptLinesAtStart    Int?              // total transcript lines at checkpoint start
   366→  checkpoint                Checkpoint        @relation(fields: [checkpointId], references: [checkpointId])
   367→  messages                  CheckpointMessage[]
   368→  summary                   CheckpointSummary?
   369→
   370→  @@index([checkpointId])
   371→}
   372→
   373→// Tracks every checkpoint a session appears in (many-to-many).
   374→// CheckpointSession.sessionId stays @unique (canonical latest-state record);
   375→// this table captures the full history.
   376→model CheckpointSessionLink {
   377→  id           Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
   378→  checkpointId String
   379→  sessionId    String
   380→
   381→  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
   382→  @@index([sessionId])
   383→}
   384→
   385→model CheckpointSummary {
   386→  id                Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
   387→  sessionId         String            @unique
   388→  intent            String
   389→  outcome           String
   390→  learningsRepo     String?           // JSON array of strings
   391→  learningsCode     String?           // JSON array of {path, finding} objects
   392→  learningsWorkflow String?           // JSON array of strings
   393→  friction          String?           // JSON array of strings
   394→  openItems         String?           // JSON array of strings
   395→  session           CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])
   396→}
   397→
   398→model CheckpointMessage {
   399→  id              Int               @id @default(autoincrement())
   400→  uuid            String            @unique  // event uuid from full.jsonl
   401→  sessionId       String
   402→  parentUuid      String?
   403→  type            String            // "user", "assistant", "progress", "file-history-snapshot", ...
   404→  timestamp       DateTime?
   405→  cwd             String?
   406→  gitBranch       String?
   407→  slug            String?
   408→  version         String?
   409→  planContent     String?           // present on user messages that include a plan
   410→  toolUseId       String?
   411→  parentToolUseId String?
   412→  data            String            // raw JSON of the full event line
   413→  session         CheckpointSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [sessionId])
   414→
   415→  @@index([sessionId])
   416→  @@index([type])
   417→}

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
  output   = "../prisma/generated/client"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

model Event {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())
  event     String
  sessionId String
  blocked   Boolean  @default(false)
  data      String   // full HookInput as JSON text
  summary   String?
  keywords  String?  // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

model Session {
  sessionId       String   @id
  startedAt       DateTime
  updatedAt       DateTime
  cwd             String
  repoRoot        String?
  repoName        String?
  parentSessionId String?
  gitUserName     String?
  gitUserEmail    String?
  prompt          String?
  summary         String?
  keywords        String?  // JSON array as text
}

model AgentParent {
  agentId         String @id
  parentSessionId String
}

model PendingToolUse {
  toolUseId String  @id
  toolName  String
  toolInput String? // JSON text
  startedAt String  // pre-formatted display string from fmt()
}

model InteractionOverview {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId String   @unique
  summary   String
  keywords  String   // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'
  startedAt DateTime
  endedAt   DateTime
}

// ─── Entire CLI checkpoint tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model CheckpointMetadata {
  id               Int                          @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion       String?
  checkpointId     String                       @unique
  strategy         String?
  branch           String?
  checkpointsCount Int                          @default(0)
  tokenUsageId     Int?                         @unique
  tokenUsage       TokenUsage?                  @relation("CheckpointMetadataTokenUsage", fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  sessions         SessionLink[]
  filesTouched     CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]
}

model SessionLink {
  id                   Int                 @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointMetadataId Int?
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata? @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  metadata             String?
  transcript           String?
  context              String?
  contentHash          String?
  prompt               String?
  logEvents            LogEvent[]

  @@index([checkpointMetadataId])
}

model CheckpointMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointMetadataId Int
  filePathId           Int
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath             FilePath           @relation("CheckpointMetadataFilePaths", fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model FilePath {
  id                     Int                                @id @default(autoincrement())
  path                   String                             @unique
  checkpointFiles        CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]        @relation("CheckpointMetadataFilePaths")
  checkpointSessionFiles CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath[] @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePaths")
}

model TokenUsage {
  id                        Int                        @id @default(autoincrement())
  inputTokens               Int                        @default(0)
  cacheCreationTokens       Int                        @default(0)
  cacheReadTokens           Int                        @default(0)
  outputTokens              Int                        @default(0)
  apiCallCount              Int                        @default(0)
  checkpointMetadata        CheckpointMetadata?        @relation("CheckpointMetadataTokenUsage")
  checkpointSessionMetadata CheckpointSessionMetadata? @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataTokenUsage")
}

model CheckpointSessionMetadata {
  id                  Int                                   @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion          String?
  checkpointId        String
  sessionId           String
  strategy            String?
  createdAt           DateTime?
  branch              String?
  checkpointsCount    Int                                   @default(0)
  agent               String?
  turnId              String?
  tokenUsageId        Int?                                  @unique
  tokenUsage          TokenUsage?                           @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataTokenUsage", fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  filesTouched        CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath[]
  initialAttribution  InitialAttribution?
  summary             CheckpointSessionSummary?

  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}

model CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointSessionMetadataId Int
  filePathId                  Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata   CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath                    FilePath                  @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePaths", fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointSessionMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model InitialAttribution {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  calculatedAt                  DateTime?
  agentLines                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanAdded                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanModified                 Int                       @default(0)
  humanRemoved                  Int                       @default(0)
  totalCommitted                Int                       @default(0)
  agentPercentage               Float                     @default(0)
}

model CheckpointSessionSummary {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  intent                        String
  outcome                       String
  openItems           OpenItem[]
  frictionItems       FrictionItem[]
  repoLearnings       RepoLearning[]
  codeLearnings       CodeLearning[]
  workflowLearnings   WorkflowItem[]
}

model OpenItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionSummaryId    Int
  checkpointSessionSummary      CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionSummaryId], references: [id])
  text                          String
  status                        String                    @default("open") // "open" | "in_progress" | "complete" | "na"
  subSessionId                  String?

  @@unique([checkpointSessionSummaryId, text])
  @@index([checkpointSessionSummaryId])
}

model FrictionItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionSummaryId    Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionSummaryId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionSummaryId])
}

model RepoLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model CodeLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  path                          String
  finding                       String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model WorkflowItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}


model CheckpointIdGitOidJoin {
  gitOid       String @id
  checkpointId String

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// ─── Full JSONL log tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// One row per line in full.jsonl, with normalized sub-tables for content blocks,
// token usage, progress events, and system events.

// Tracks an in-progress session from a shadow branch (entire/<commit>-<hash>).
// Shadow sessions are indexed directly from git without a worktree.
// Once a session is committed to entire/checkpoints/v1 it also appears as a
// CheckpointSessionMetadata; the LogEvent uuid-dedup prevents double-indexing.
model ShadowSession {
  id            Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId     String     @unique
  branch        String              // most recently active shadow branch
  seenBlobShas  String     @default("[]")  // JSON array of git blob SHAs already indexed
  prompt        String?
  cwd           String?
  gitBranch     String?             // the working branch inside the session
  createdAt     DateTime?
  logEvents     LogEvent[]
}

model LogEvent {
  id              Int             @id @default(autoincrement())
  uuid            String?         @unique  // present on most event types
  messageId       String?         @unique  // used by file-history-snapshot instead of uuid
  sessionId       String?
  parentUuid      String?
  type            String          // user | assistant | progress | system | file-history-snapshot
  timestamp       DateTime?
  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  version         String?
  slug            String?
  isSidechain     Boolean?
  userType        String?
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  requestId       String?         // present on assistant events
  data            String          // full raw JSON of the event line
  sessionLinkId   Int?
  sessionLink     SessionLink?    @relation(fields: [sessionLinkId], references: [id])
  shadowSessionId Int?
  shadowSession   ShadowSession?  @relation(fields: [shadowSessionId], references: [id])
  contents        LogContent[]
  usage           LogUsage?
  hookProgress    LogHookProgress?
  systemData      LogSystemEvent?

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([sessionLinkId])
  @@index([shadowSessionId])
}

// One row per content block within a user or assistant message.
model LogContent {
  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId        Int
  logEvent          LogEvent  @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  role              String    // user | assistant
  contentIndex      Int       // 0-based position in the content array
  contentType       String    // text | thinking | tool_use | tool_result
  text              String?   // type=text
  thinking          String?   // type=thinking
  toolUseId         String?   // type=tool_use (id field) or type=tool_result (tool_use_id field)
  toolName          String?   // type=tool_use
  toolInput         String?   // type=tool_use, JSON text of input object
  toolResultContent String?   // type=tool_result, stringified content
  isError           Boolean?  // type=tool_result

  @@index([logEventId])
  @@index([toolUseId])
}

// Token usage summary for assistant messages.
model LogUsage {
  id                       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId               Int      @unique
  logEvent                 LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  model                    String?
  stopReason               String?
  inputTokens              Int      @default(0)
  cacheCreationInputTokens Int      @default(0)
  cacheReadInputTokens     Int      @default(0)
  outputTokens             Int      @default(0)
}

// The `data` sub-object present on progress events (type=hook_progress).
model LogHookProgress {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId Int      @unique
  logEvent   LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  type       String?  // e.g. hook_progress
  hookEvent  String?  // e.g. PreToolUse, PostToolUse
  hookName   String?  // e.g. PreToolUse:Read
  command    String?  // shell command that was run
}

// Extra fields for system events.
model LogSystemEvent {
  id                    Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId            Int      @unique
  logEvent              LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  subtype               String?  // e.g. stop_hook_summary, turn_duration
  hookCount             Int?
  stopReason            String?
  preventedContinuation Boolean?
  level                 String?
  durationMs            Int?     // present on turn_duration subtype
}

// ------------------------------------------- OLD

model Checkpoint {
  id           Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId String             @unique
  cliVersion   String?
  branch       String?
  strategy     String?

}

model CheckpointSession {
  id                 Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointId       String

  sessionId          String             @unique

  agent              String?
  createdAt          DateTime?
  filesTouched       String?            // JSON array

  initialAttribution        String?           // JSON object: agent_lines, human_added, agent_percentage, ...
  checkpointTranscriptStart Int?              // line index where this checkpoint's events begin in the transcript

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// Tracks every checkpoint a session appears in (many-to-many).
// CheckpointSession.sessionId stays @unique (canonical latest-state record);
// this table captures the full history.
model CheckpointSessionLink {

model CheckpointMessage {
  id              Int               @id @default(autoincrement())

  version         String?
  planContent     String?           // present on user messages that include a plan
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  data            String            // raw JSON of the full event line

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
}

Now I have a clear picture. The `Session` table has three usages:

1. **`db.ts`** — `readStateFromDb`/`writeStateToDb` (hook handler state)
2. **`handler.ts:1395`** — looks up `cwd` of recently-ended session for auto-linking
3. **`search.ts:146`** — LEFT JOIN for `gitUserName`/`gitUserEmail` enrichment

The bug: `writeStateToDb` upserts but never deletes, and `applyEvent` already removes sessions from the in-memory state on `SessionEnd` (line 720). So ended sessions accumulate as dead rows forever.

Fixes needed:
1. **`handler.ts`** — remove the `db.session.findUnique` call; parse `cwd` from `recentEnd.data` directly (the full HookInput is already stored there)
2. **`db.ts`** — sync the `Session` table to exactly match in-memory state (delete rows not in state)

content.text:
Here's the situation:

The `Session` table serves as a **cross-invocation scratchpad** for the hook handler. Since the handler process is spawned fresh for each hook event, it uses the `Session` table to persist ephemeral in-flight session data between calls:

- `cwd`, `repoRoot`, `repoName` — from `SessionStart`, needed on later events
- `gitUserName`, `gitUserEmail` — computed from `git config` at `SessionStart`
- `summary`, `keywords` — computed async at `UserPromptSubmit`
- `parentSessionId` — already in `AgentParent` table (redundant)
- `prompt` — already in the `Event` table `data` column

The problem is that **all of this is already in the `Event` table**:
- `cwd`, `prompt`, etc. are in each event's `data` JSON
- `summary`/`keywords` are already written as columns on the `UserPromptSubmit` `Event` row (line 824–829 of `writeEventLog`)
- `repoRoot`/`repoName` are derivable by calling `detectRepo(cwd)`, same as the handler already does
- `gitUser()` is a lightweight `git config` read — fine to call per-invocation

So yes — the `Session` table is entirely redundant. We can remove it and instead reconstruct per-session context on each hook invocation by querying the `Event` table. `State` would shrink to just `agentParents` + `pendingToolUses`.

The refactor involves:
1. Remove `Session` model from `schema.prisma`
2. Drop `sessions` from the `State` type and `readStateFromDb`/`writeStateToDb` in `db.ts`
3. Rewrite `applyEvent` — no longer builds a session map; instead each handler invocation re-derives what it needs (cwd from `SessionStart` event, summary from `UserPromptSubmit` event, etc.)
4. Update `renderMarkdown` to query active sessions from the `Event` table (sessions with `SessionStart` but no `SessionEnd`)
5. Update `search.ts` — drop the `LEFT JOIN Session` (gitUserName/gitUserEmail would need to come from `UserPromptSubmit` Event data or be dropped)
6. Run `prisma db push` to drop the table

1→import type { PrismaClient } from "../prisma/generated/client/index.js";
     2→
     3→// ─── Setup ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     4→
     5→/**
     6→ * Create the FTS5 virtual table if it doesn't exist.
     7→ * The rowid of LogContentFts equals LogContent.id so results can be joined back.
     8→ * Metadata columns (contentType, logEventId, sessionId, timestamp, toolName) are
     9→ * stored but not indexed (UNINDEXED) — they're used for filtering and display.
    10→ */
    11→export async function setupLogContentFts(db: PrismaClient): Promise<void> {
    12→  await db.$executeRawUnsafe(`
    13→    CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS LogContentFts USING fts5(
    14→      text,
    15→      thinking,
    16→      toolResultContent,
    17→      toolInput,
    18→      contentType   UNINDEXED,
    19→      logEventId    UNINDEXED,
    20→      sessionId     UNINDEXED,
    21→      timestamp     UNINDEXED,
    22→      toolName      UNINDEXED
    23→    )
    24→  `);
    25→}
    26→
    27→// ─── Sync ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    28→
    29→/**
    30→ * Insert any LogContent rows not yet present in the FTS index.
    31→ * Safe to call repeatedly — already-indexed rows are skipped via rowid check.
    32→ * Returns the number of rows inserted.
    33→ */
    34→export async function syncLogContentFts(db: PrismaClient): Promise<number> {
    35→  return db.$executeRawUnsafe(`
    36→    INSERT INTO LogContentFts(
    37→      rowid, text, thinking, toolResultContent, toolInput,
    38→      contentType, logEventId, sessionId, timestamp, toolName
    39→    )
    40→    SELECT
    41→      lc.id,
    42→      COALESCE(lc.text,              ''),
    43→      COALESCE(lc.thinking,          ''),
    44→      COALESCE(lc.toolResultContent, ''),
    45→      COALESCE(lc.toolInput,         ''),
    46→      lc.contentType,
    47→      lc.logEventId,
    48→      COALESCE(le.sessionId,  ''),
    49→      COALESCE(le.timestamp,  ''),
    50→      COALESCE(lc.toolName,   '')
    51→    FROM LogContent lc
    52→    LEFT JOIN LogEvent le ON le.id = lc.logEventId
    53→    WHERE lc.id NOT IN (SELECT rowid FROM LogContentFts)
    54→  `);
    55→}
    56→
    57→/**
    58→ * Drop and rebuild the FTS index from scratch.
    59→ * Use this after bulk imports when incremental sync is too slow.
    60→ */
    61→export async function rebuildLogContentFts(db: PrismaClient): Promise<void> {
    62→  await db.$executeRawUnsafe(`DELETE FROM LogContentFts`);
    63→  await syncLogContentFts(db);
    64→}
    65→
    66→// ─── Search ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    67→
    68→export interface LogContentSearchResult {
    69→  logContentId: number;
    70→  logEventId: number;
    71→  sessionId: string;
    72→  timestamp: string | null;
    73→  contentType: string;
    74→  toolName: string | null;
    75→  /** "user" | "assistant" — which side of the conversation this content came from. */
    76→  logEventType: string;
    77→  gitUserName: string | null;
    78→  gitUserEmail: string | null;
    79→  /** FTS5 snippet with «match» markers around matched terms. */
    80→  snippet: string;
    81→  /** BM25 rank (more negative = better match). */
    82→  rank: number;
    83→}
    84→
    85→/**
    86→ * Full-text search across LogContent fields (text, thinking, toolResultContent,
    87→ * toolInput).  Accepts standard FTS5 MATCH syntax:
    88→ *   - bare word:   foo
    89→ *   - phrase:      "foo bar"
    90→ *   - prefix:      foo*
    91→ *   - column:      text:foo
    92→ *   - boolean:     foo AND bar, foo OR bar, foo NOT bar
    93→ *
    94→ * Results are ordered by BM25 relevance (best first).
    95→ */
    96→export async function searchLogContent(
    97→  db: PrismaClient,
    98→  query: string,
    99→  limit = 50,
   100→): Promise<LogContentSearchResult[]> {
   101→  type Row = {
   102→    logContentId: number | bigint;
   103→    logEventId: number | bigint;
   104→    sessionId: string;
   105→    timestamp: string | null;
   106→    contentType: string;
   107→    toolName: string | null;
   108→    logEventType: string;
   109→    gitUserName: string | null;
   110→    gitUserEmail: string | null;
   111→    snippet: string;
   112→    rank: number;
   113→  };
   114→
   115→  // Run FTS match in a subquery first, then join for extra metadata.
   116→  const rows = await db.$queryRawUnsafe<Row[]>(`
   117→    SELECT
   118→      fts.logContentId,
   119→      fts.logEventId,
   120→      fts.sessionId,
   121→      fts.timestamp,
   122→      fts.contentType,
   123→      fts.toolName,
   124→      fts.snippet,
   125→      fts.rank,
   126→      le.type   AS logEventType,
   127→      s.gitUserName,
   128→      s.gitUserEmail
   129→    FROM (
   130→      SELECT
   131→        rowid                                              AS logContentId,
   132→        logEventId,
   133→        sessionId,
   134→        timestamp,
   135→        contentType,
   136→        toolName,
   137→        snippet(LogContentFts, -1, '«', '»', '…', 24)   AS snippet,
   138→        -- Weight text/thinking 10× higher than toolResultContent/toolInput.
   139→        bm25(LogContentFts, 10, 10, 1, 1)                AS rank
   140→      FROM LogContentFts
   141→      WHERE LogContentFts MATCH ?
   142→      ORDER BY rank
   143→      LIMIT ?
   144→    ) fts
   145→    JOIN LogEvent le ON le.id = fts.logEventId
   146→    LEFT JOIN Session s ON s.sessionId = fts.sessionId
   147→  `, query, limit);
   148→
   149→  return rows.map((r) => ({
   150→    logContentId:  Number(r.logContentId),
   151→    logEventId:    Number(r.logEventId),
   152→    sessionId:     r.sessionId,
   153→    timestamp:     r.timestamp,
   154→    contentType:   r.contentType,
   155→    toolName:      r.toolName || null,
   156→    logEventType:  r.logEventType,
   157→    gitUserName:   r.gitUserName || null,
   158→    gitUserEmail:  r.gitUserEmail || null,
   159→    snippet:       r.snippet,
   160→    rank:          r.rank,
   161→  }));
   162→}

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
  output   = "../prisma/generated/client"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
}

model InteractionOverview {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId String   @unique
  summary   String
  keywords  String   // JSON array as text: '["a","b"]'
  startedAt DateTime
  endedAt   DateTime
}

// ─── Entire CLI checkpoint tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────

model CheckpointMetadata {
  id               Int                          @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion       String?
  checkpointId     String                       @unique
  strategy         String?
  branch           String?
  checkpointsCount Int                          @default(0)
  tokenUsageId     Int?                         @unique
  tokenUsage       TokenUsage?                  @relation("CheckpointMetadataTokenUsage", fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  sessions         SessionLink[]
  filesTouched     CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]
}

model SessionLink {
  id                   Int                 @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointMetadataId Int?
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata? @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  metadata             String?
  transcript           String?
  context              String?
  contentHash          String?
  prompt               String?
  logEvents            LogEvent[]

  @@index([checkpointMetadataId])
}

model CheckpointMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointMetadataId Int
  filePathId           Int
  checkpointMetadata   CheckpointMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath             FilePath           @relation("CheckpointMetadataFilePaths", fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model FilePath {
  id                     Int                                @id @default(autoincrement())
  path                   String                             @unique
  checkpointFiles        CheckpointMetadataFilePath[]        @relation("CheckpointMetadataFilePaths")
  checkpointSessionFiles CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath[] @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePaths")
}

model TokenUsage {
  id                        Int                        @id @default(autoincrement())
  inputTokens               Int                        @default(0)
  cacheCreationTokens       Int                        @default(0)
  cacheReadTokens           Int                        @default(0)
  outputTokens              Int                        @default(0)
  apiCallCount              Int                        @default(0)
  checkpointMetadata        CheckpointMetadata?        @relation("CheckpointMetadataTokenUsage")
  checkpointSessionMetadata CheckpointSessionMetadata? @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataTokenUsage")
}

model CheckpointSessionMetadata {
  id                  Int                                   @id @default(autoincrement())
  cliVersion          String?
  checkpointId        String
  sessionId           String
  strategy            String?
  createdAt           DateTime?
  branch              String?
  checkpointsCount    Int                                   @default(0)
  agent               String?
  turnId              String?
  tokenUsageId        Int?                                  @unique
  tokenUsage          TokenUsage?                           @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataTokenUsage", fields: [tokenUsageId], references: [id])
  filesTouched        CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath[]
  initialAttribution  InitialAttribution?
  summary             CheckpointSessionSummary?

  @@unique([checkpointId, sessionId])
  @@index([sessionId])
}

model CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePath {
  checkpointSessionMetadataId Int
  filePathId                  Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata   CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  filePath                    FilePath                  @relation("CheckpointSessionMetadataFilePaths", fields: [filePathId], references: [id])

  @@id([checkpointSessionMetadataId, filePathId])
}

model InitialAttribution {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  calculatedAt                  DateTime?
  agentLines                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanAdded                    Int                       @default(0)
  humanModified                 Int                       @default(0)
  humanRemoved                  Int                       @default(0)
  totalCommitted                Int                       @default(0)
  agentPercentage               Float                     @default(0)
}

model CheckpointSessionSummary {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int                       @unique
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionMetadata @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  intent                        String
  outcome                       String
  openItems           OpenItem[]
  frictionItems       FrictionItem[]
  repoLearnings       RepoLearning[]
  codeLearnings       CodeLearning[]
  workflowLearnings   WorkflowItem[]
}

model OpenItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionSummaryId    Int
  checkpointSessionSummary      CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionSummaryId], references: [id])
  text                          String
  status                        String                    @default("open") // "open" | "in_progress" | "complete" | "na"
  subSessionId                  String?

  @@unique([checkpointSessionSummaryId, text])
  @@index([checkpointSessionSummaryId])
}

model FrictionItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionSummaryId    Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionSummaryId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionSummaryId])
}

model RepoLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model CodeLearning {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  path                          String
  finding                       String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}

model WorkflowItem {
  id                            Int                       @id @default(autoincrement())
  checkpointSessionMetadataId   Int
  checkpointSessionMetadata     CheckpointSessionSummary @relation(fields: [checkpointSessionMetadataId], references: [id])
  text                          String

  @@index([checkpointSessionMetadataId])
}


model CheckpointIdGitOidJoin {
  gitOid       String @id
  checkpointId String

  @@index([checkpointId])
}

// ─── Full JSONL log tables ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// One row per line in full.jsonl, with normalized sub-tables for content blocks,
// token usage, progress events, and system events.

// Tracks an in-progress session from a shadow branch (entire/<commit>-<hash>).
// Shadow sessions are indexed directly from git without a worktree.
// Once a session is committed to entire/checkpoints/v1 it also appears as a
// CheckpointSessionMetadata; the LogEvent uuid-dedup prevents double-indexing.
model ShadowSession {
  id            Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  sessionId     String     @unique
  branch        String              // most recently active shadow branch
  seenBlobShas  String     @default("[]")  // JSON array of git blob SHAs already indexed
  prompt        String?
  cwd           String?
  gitBranch     String?             // the working branch inside the session
  createdAt     DateTime?
  logEvents     LogEvent[]
}

model LogEvent {
  id              Int             @id @default(autoincrement())
  uuid            String?         @unique  // present on most event types
  messageId       String?         @unique  // used by file-history-snapshot instead of uuid
  sessionId       String?
  parentUuid      String?
  type            String          // user | assistant | progress | system | file-history-snapshot
  timestamp       DateTime?
  cwd             String?
  gitBranch       String?
  version         String?
  slug            String?
  isSidechain     Boolean?
  userType        String?
  toolUseId       String?
  parentToolUseId String?
  requestId       String?         // present on assistant events
  data            String          // full raw JSON of the event line
  sessionLinkId   Int?
  sessionLink     SessionLink?    @relation(fields: [sessionLinkId], references: [id])
  shadowSessionId Int?
  shadowSession   ShadowSession?  @relation(fields: [shadowSessionId], references: [id])
  contents        LogContent[]
  usage           LogUsage?
  hookProgress    LogHookProgress?
  systemData      LogSystemEvent?

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([sessionLinkId])
  @@index([shadowSessionId])
}

// One row per content block within a user or assistant message.
model LogContent {
  id                Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId        Int
  logEvent          LogEvent  @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  role              String    // user | assistant
  contentIndex      Int       // 0-based position in the content array
  contentType       String    // text | thinking | tool_use | tool_result
  text              String?   // type=text
  thinking          String?   // type=thinking
  toolUseId         String?   // type=tool_use (id field) or type=tool_result (tool_use_id field)
  toolName          String?   // type=tool_use
  toolInput         String?   // type=tool_use, JSON text of input object
  toolResultContent String?   // type=tool_result, stringified content
  isError           Boolean?  // type=tool_result

  @@index([logEventId])
  @@index([toolUseId])
}

// Token usage summary for assistant messages.
model LogUsage {
  id                       Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId               Int      @unique
  logEvent                 LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  model                    String?
  stopReason               String?
  inputTokens              Int      @default(0)
  cacheCreationInputTokens Int      @default(0)
  cacheReadInputTokens     Int      @default(0)
  outputTokens             Int      @default(0)
}

// The `data` sub-object present on progress events (type=hook_progress).
model LogHookProgress {
  id         Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId Int      @unique
  logEvent   LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  type       String?  // e.g. hook_progress
  hookEvent  String?  // e.g. PreToolUse, PostToolUse
  hookName   String?  // e.g. PreToolUse:Read
  command    String?  // shell command that was run
}

// Extra fields for system events.
model LogSystemEvent {
  id                    Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  logEventId            Int      @unique
  logEvent              LogEvent @relation(fields: [logEventId], references: [id])
  subtype               String?  // e.g. stop_hook_summary, turn_duration
  hookCount             Int?
  stopReason            String?
  preventedContinuation Boolean?
  level                 String?
  durationMs            Int?     // present on turn_duration subtype
}
